= table-complex(1)
:doctype: manpage
:revdate: 2025-01-20

== Name

table-complex - test complex table cells

== Description

A table with non-paragraph content in cells.

[cols="1,1"]
|===
|Header 1 |Header 2

|Simple paragraph
a|
* Item one
* Item two

a|
----
code block
----
a|
NOTE: This is an admonition
|===
